title: On George Herbert's Poems
content:
What are these leaves dark-spotted and acerb?
    'A very holy herb.'
    To what good use may I this herb convert?
    'Press it on thy soul's hurt.'
    When herb unto the hurt I thus apply?
    'Herb-ert is sanctity.'
meaning:
James Thomson -  (Bysshe Vanolis)'s contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "On George Herbert's Poems"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
